steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank must describe Lucian's work 'True History' in a way that fits the evidence: it contains sci-fi tropes (space travel, interplanetary conflict) and is regarded as the earliest known work in the genre — despite being written in the second century, long before science fiction formally existed.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "authorized": means officially approved or sanctioned. Nothing in the passage deals with permission or official recognition. ✗
  • "applicable": means relevant or suitable to a situation. The passage isn't arguing that the work is relevant to something — it's describing its forward-looking nature. ✗
  • "sarcastic": means using irony to mock. Lucian was a satirist, but this sentence is specifically about 'True History,' and the passage emphasizes its sci-fi content, not its tone of mockery. ✗
  • "visionary": means showing remarkable foresight or imagination ahead of its time. A work from the second century that anticipates a genre centuries before it existed is the definition of visionary. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
